C

CANCELLED - Enum constant in enum class com.example.eventsapp.Entrant.Status
Entrant's application or invitation has been cancelled.
CancelledEntrantAdapter - Class in com.example.eventsapp
RecyclerView adapter used to display cancelled and declined entrants.
CancelledEntrantAdapter(Context, ArrayList<Entrant>) - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.CancelledEntrantAdapter
Constructs a CancelledEntrantAdapter.
CaptureActivityPortrait - Class in com.example.eventsapp
A custom CaptureActivity that is locked in portrait orientation.
CaptureActivityPortrait() - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.CaptureActivityPortrait
 
cleanupExpiredEvents() - Static method in class com.example.eventsapp.EventCleanupHelper
Checks all events in Firestore and deletes any that have expired (event_date + 12 hours has passed).
CO_ORGANIZER_INVITATION - Enum constant in enum class com.example.eventsapp.UserNotification.Type
Invitation to become a co-organizer for an event.
com.example.eventsapp - package com.example.eventsapp
 
Comment - Class in com.example.eventsapp
Represents a comment object on an event.
Comment() - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.Comment
No-argument constructor required for Firestore deserialization.
Comment(String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.Comment
Constructs a Comment with author details and content, capturing the current time as its timestamp.
CommentAdapter - Class in com.example.eventsapp
Adapter for displaying a list of comments in a RecyclerView within the Event view.
CommentAdapter(List<Comment>) - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.CommentAdapter
Constructs a CommentAdapter with the given list of comments.
CommentAdapter.OnCommentDeleteListener - Interface in com.example.eventsapp
Callback invoked when a comment should be deleted.
CreateEventFragment - Class in com.example.eventsapp
A fragment that allows users to create a new event.
CreateEventFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.CreateEventFragment
 
CSVExporter - Class in com.example.eventsapp
Utility class to handle exporting data to a CSV file.
CSVExporter() - Constructor for class com.example.eventsapp.CSVExporter
 
CSVExporter.CsvRowMapper<T> - Interface in com.example.eventsapp
Strategy interface that converts a domain object into an ordered array of CSV field values.
